issue.title: Residual support assets Python sweep O

branch.name: BIG-GO-196
branch.latest_commit: use git rev-parse --short HEAD on BIG-GO-196

commands: find bigclaw-go/examples reports docs/reports bigclaw-go/docs/reports scripts/ops -type f -name '*.py' 2>/dev/null | sort

blocker.summary: The repository-wide physical Python file count was already zero in this workspace before BIG-GO-196 changes.

notes: This lane records the support-asset surfaces as already Python-free and ties them to retained Go/native reports, examples, and helper entrypoints.
The branch baseline was already Python-free, so this lane strengthens issue-scoped regression coverage and validation evidence rather than removing in-branch Python files.
Baseline HEAD before lane changes was `36121df8`.
Implementation commit was `c1aa0212 BIG-GO-196 add support asset python sweep guard`.
The branch was pushed with `git push -u origin BIG-GO-196`.
